caption: The video shows a cooking process where a person is preparing a dish on a stovetop. A large pot filled with a yellowish liquid, likely a broth or soup base, is placed on one of the burners. The person is holding a thermometer to check the temperature of the liquid, ensuring it reaches the desired level for cooking. In the inset image, another individual appears to be demonstrating or explaining something related to the cooking process, possibly providing instructions or commentary. The kitchen setting includes various utensils and ingredients, indicating an active cooking environment. The focus is on maintaining the correct temperature for the dish being prepared.
